lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧੜੇ ਕੁਲਾਹ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਹੇਕੜੋ ॥
lines.translit: dhandharre kulaah chit na aavai hekarro |
lines.english: Worldly affairs are unprofitable, if the One Lord does not come to mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਲੜਿ ਲਾਇ ਉਧਾਰਿਅਨੁ ਦਯੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਅਮਿਤਾ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: naanak larr laae udhaarian day sev amitaa |19|
lines.english: O Nanak, serve the Infinite Lord; grasp the hem of His robe, and He will save you. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰੇਤਹੁ ਕੀਤੋਨੁ ਦੇਵਤਾ ਤਿਨਿ ਕਰਣੈਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: paretahu keeton devataa tin karanaihaare |
lines.english: The ghost has been transformed into an angel by the Creator Lord.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇਈ ਤੰਨ ਫੁਟੰਨਿ ਜਿਨਾ ਸਾਂਈ ਵਿਸਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak seee tan futtan jinaa saanee visarai |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the bodies of those who forget their Master shall burst apart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਸਿਖ ਉਬਾਰਿਅਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕਾਜ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe sikh ubaarian prabh kaaj savaare |
lines.english: God has emancipated all the Sikhs and resolved their affairs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਕ ਪਕੜਿ ਪਛਾੜਿਅਨੁ ਝੂਠੇ ਦਰਬਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: nindak pakarr pachhaarrian jhootthe darabaare |
lines.english: He has seized the slanderers and thrown them to the ground, and declared them false in His Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਅੰਤੁ ਨਾਹਿ ਸਭੁ ਤਿਸੈ ਕਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh beant kichh ant naeh sabh tisai karanaa |
lines.english: God is unlimited; He has no limit; He is the One who does everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਵਡਾ ਹੈ ਆਪਿ ਸਾਜਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak kaa prabh vaddaa hai aap saaj savaare |2|
lines.english: Nanak's God is glorious and great; He Himself creates and adorns. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੋ ਜੀਆਂ ਕਾ ਪਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: agam agochar saahibo jeean kaa paranaa |
lines.english: The Inaccessible and Unapproachable Lord and Master is the Support of His beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਸਤ ਦੇਇ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਦਾ ਭਰਣ ਪੋਖਣੁ ਕਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: hasat dee pratipaaladaa bharan pokhan karanaa |
lines.english: Giving His Hand, He nurtures and cherishes; He is the Filler and Fulfiller.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਭਲਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਸਰਣਾ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: jo tudh bhaavai so bhalaa naanak daas saranaa |20|
lines.english: Whatever pleases You - that alone is good; slave Nanak seeks Your Sanctuary. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨੁ ਬਖਸਿੰਦੁ ਆਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਸਚੇ ਤਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: miharavaan bakhasind aap jap sache taranaa |
lines.english: He Himself is Merciful and Forgiving. Chanting the True Name, one is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਗਿਆ ਉਧਰੈ ਸਭੋ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak charanee lagiaa udharai sabho koe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, everyone who falls at his feet is saved. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿੰਨਾ ਭੁਖ ਨ ਕਾ ਰਹੀ ਜਿਸ ਦਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਹੈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tinaa bhukh na kaa rahee jis daa prabh hai soe |
lines.english: One who belongs to God has no hunger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਜਜਮਾਨੁ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਭੁਖ ਨ ਮੂਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak paramesar jajamaan tiseh bhukh na mool |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Transcendent Lord is the most generous host; He does not lack anything at all. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਚਿਕੁ ਮੰਗੈ ਨਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਕਰੇ ਕਬੂਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaachik mangai nit naam saahib kare kabool |
lines.english: If the beggar begs for the Lord's Name every day, his Lord and Master will grant his request.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਰਤਾ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਚੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਜੋੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: man rataa govind sang sach bhojan jorre |
lines.english: To imbue the mind with the Lord of the Universe is the true food and dress.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਸਿਉ ਏ ਹਸਤੀ ਘੋੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: preet lagee har naam siau e hasatee ghorre |
lines.english: To embrace love for the Name of the Lord is to possess horses and elephants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜ ਮਿਲਖ ਖੁਸੀਆ ਘਣੀ ਧਿਆਇ ਮੁਖੁ ਨ ਮੋੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: raaj milakh khuseea ghanee dhiaae mukh na morre |
lines.english: To meditate on the Lord steadfastly is to rule over kingdoms of property and enjoy all sorts of pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਾਢੀ ਦਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੰਗਣਾ ਦਰੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਛੋੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: dtaadtee dar prabh manganaa dar kade na chhorre |
lines.english: The minstrel begs at God's Door - he shall never leave that Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਚਾਉ ਏਹੁ ਨਿਤ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਉ ਲੋੜੇ ॥੨੧॥੧॥ ਸੁਧੁ ਕੀਚੇ
lines.translit: naanak man tan chaau ehu nit prabh kau lorre |21|1| sudh keeche
lines.english: Nanak has this yearning in his mind and body - he longs continually for God. ||21||1|| Sudh Keechay||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. By Guru's Grace:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਭਗਤਾਂ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag gaurree bhagataan kee baanee |
lines.english: Raag Gauree, The Word Of The Devotees:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕੇ ਚਉਪਦੇ ੧੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree guaareree sree kabeer jeeo ke chaupade 14 |
lines.english: Gauree Gwaarayree, Fourteen Chau-Padhay Of Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਮੋਹਿ ਜਲਤ ਰਾਮ ਜਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ab mohi jalat raam jal paaeaa |
lines.english: I was on fire, but now I have found the Water of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਉਦਕਿ ਤਨੁ ਜਲਤ ਬੁਝਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam udak tan jalat bujhaaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This Water of the Lord's Name has cooled my burning body. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਲੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਗਵੰਤ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: so jal bin bhagavant na paaeeai |1|
lines.english: but that Water is not found without the Lord God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰਣ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਬਨ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: man maaran kaaran ban jaaeeai |
lines.english: To subdue their minds, some go off into the forests;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਪਾਵਕ ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਹੈ ਜਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jih paavak sur nar hai jaare |
lines.english: That fire has consumed angels and mortal beings,

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਉਦਕਿ ਜਨ ਜਲਤ ਉਬਾਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: raam udak jan jalat ubaare |2|
lines.english: but the Water of the Lord's Name saves His humble servants from burning. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਵ ਸਾਗਰ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: bhav saagar sukh saagar maahee |
lines.english: In the terrifying world-ocean, there is an ocean of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਉਦਕਿ ਮੇਰੀ ਤਿਖਾ ਬੁਝਾਨੀ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: raam udak meree tikhaa bujhaanee |4|1|
lines.english: The Water of the Lord's Name has quenched my thirst. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਵਿ ਰਹੇ ਜਲ ਨਿਖੁਟਤ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: peev rahe jal nikhuttat naahee |3|
lines.english: I continue to drink it in, but this Water is never exhausted. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਭਜੁ ਸਾਰਿੰਗਪਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer bhaj saaringapaanee |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, meditate and vibrate upon the Lord, like the rainbird remembering the water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਧਉ ਜਲ ਕੀ ਪਿਆਸ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maadhau jal kee piaas na jaae |
lines.english: O Lord, my thirst for the Water of Your Name will not go away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree kabeer jee |
lines.english: Gauree, Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਮਹਿ ਅਗਨਿ ਉਠੀ ਅਧਿਕਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jal meh agan utthee adhikaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The fire of my thirst burns even more brightly in that Water. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਪਿੰਜਰੁ ਹਉ ਸੂਅਟਾ ਤੋਰ ॥
lines.translit: toon pinjar hau sooattaa tor |
lines.english: You are the cage, and I am Your parrot.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਉ ਜਲਹਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਖੀਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jal meh rhau jaleh bin kheen |1|
lines.english: In that Water, I remain; without that Water, I would perish. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਜਲਨਿਧਿ ਹਉ ਜਲ ਕਾ ਮੀਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: toon jalanidh hau jal kaa meen |
lines.english: You are the Ocean of Water, and I am just a fish in that Water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਦਭਾਗੀ ਤੇਰੋ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mandabhaagee tero darasan naeh |3|
lines.english: I am so unfortunate - I cannot see the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan! ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਤਰਵਰੁ ਹਉ ਪੰਖੀ ਆਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: toon taravar hau pankhee aaeh |
lines.english: You are the tree, and I am the bird.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮੁ ਮੰਜਾਰੁ ਕਹਾ ਕਰੈ ਮੋਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jam manjaar kahaa karai mor |2|
lines.english: So what can the cat of death do to me? ||2||
